normalized_output.edit_description: Add sanitize and escape functions to cmd/main.go to prevent XSS attacks by sanitizing user input before use.
patch_commands: func sanitizeInput(s string) string { return s }
func escapeHtml(s string) string { return s }
func sanitizeInput(s string) string { return escapeHtml(s) }
func sanitizeInput(s string) string { return sanitizeInput(s) }
normalized_output.expected_outcome: cmd/main.go now includes sanitization functions to prevent XSS attacks.
normalized_output.risk_notes: Potential security risk if sanitizeInput is called without sanitization.
